title: [Py] Adding named input/output args/results to body_builder
body:
Making `body_builder`s arguments correspond to input ports names. Optionally create an `OutputOp` out of the return value from `body_builder`. Essentially moves and expands useful functionality from `circt.design_entry` to `circt.dialects.hw`.

Also, move all of the `module.entry_block.arguments[1]` ugliness to the new `module.foo` syntax.
